settings.heading: How To Use HAGUEPROTECT Shoe Cleaning & Protecting Products:

settings.title: Suede
settings.description: Suede needs gentle, dry-first cleaning to preserve its napped texture.
settings.tips:
Use the soft-hog brush only — never a stiff brush
Brush in one direction to lift dirt from the nap
Use minimal moisture — damp, never soaking
Restore nap with a suede eraser after drying

settings.title: Leather
settings.description: Smooth leather responds best to pH-balanced cleaner and light conditioning.
settings.tips:
Wipe with a damp microfiber cloth first
Apply cleaner in small circular motions
Buff with a clean dry cloth for shine
Condition monthly to prevent cracking

settings.title: Nubuck
settings.description: Nubuck is finer than suede — treat it with extra care and minimal water.
settings.tips:
Always brush dry before any wet cleaning
Use the softest brush in your kit
Pat dry — never rub aggressively
Apply protector to maintain water resistance

settings.title: Mesh & Fabric
settings.description: Knit, mesh, and canvas uppers need targeted cleaning without overwetting.
settings.tips:
Remove insoles and laces before cleaning
Use the medium brush on mesh panels
Avoid soaking — foam cleaner works best
Air dry stuffed with paper towels

settings.title: Soles
settings.description: Midsoles and outsoles can handle more aggressive cleaning for icy-white results.
settings.tips:
Use the stiff brush on rubber soles
Apply sole-specific cleaner for yellowing
Scrub midsoles in back-and-forth strokes
Wipe clean and protect from future yellowing

settings.intro_text: Every premium sneaker deserves a system — not shortcuts. Master the Hague Protect three-step protocol for results that last.
settings.protocol_subheading: Follow this sequence every time for professional-grade results.
settings.materials_subheading: Select your upper material for tailored tips and the right brush.
settings.do_list:
Brush dry dirt off before wet cleaning
Use the soft brush on suede and nubuck
Let shoes air dry — never use a heater
Apply protector on fully dry shoes
Test cleaner on a hidden spot first
settings.dont_list:
Never put sneakers in a washing machine
Don't use harsh bleach or alcohol-based cleaners
Avoid scrubbing suede with stiff bristles
Don't wear shoes before they're completely dry
Never skip the protection step
settings.cta_text: Get the complete kit with every brush, solution, and protector you need — in one box.
